---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
###############################################################################
##  Legible cnet-plots  (2-D PDF)  +  optional 3-D interactive network       ##
##  Works with:  output/enrichment_objects.rds (written by your main NB)     ##
##                                                                             ##
##  Outputs in  output/cnetplots/ :                                           ##
##    – cnetplots_decluttered.pdf   GO / KEGG / Reactome (clean 2-D)          ##
##    – cnet_GO_ORA_3D.html         interactive 3-D GO network (if possible)  ##
##                                                                             ##
##  2025-06-xx  — helper script for Galen O’Shea-Stone                        ##
###############################################################################

## ---- 1. Setup --------------------------------------------------------------
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(enrichplot)   # cnetplot()
  library(igraph)       # graph ops
  library(ggraph)       # ggplot2 on igraph
  library(ggrepel)      # repel text
  library(plotly)       # 3-D networks
  library(dplyr)
  library(htmlwidgets)
})

## ---- 2. Load enrichment objects -------------------------------------------
obj     <- readRDS("enrichment_objects.rds")
ego     <- obj$ego
ekegg   <- obj$ekegg
ereact  <- obj$ereact
fc_vec  <- obj$fc_vec        # named logFC for colouring

outdir  <- "output/cnetplots"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## ---- 3. Helper:  decluttered cnetplot --------------------------------------
make_cnet <- function(enrich_obj,
                      title      = deparse(substitute(enrich_obj)),
                      top_terms  = 8,
                      min_genes  = 3,
                      gene_cex   = 0.8,
                      term_cex   = 1.2,
                      layout_alg = "fr") {

  df <- as.data.frame(enrich_obj)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  pass_ids <- df %>%
    filter(Count >= min_genes) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_terms) %>%
    pull(ID)

  trimmed <- enrich_obj
  trimmed@result <- trimmed@result[trimmed@result$ID %in% pass_ids, , drop = FALSE]

  ## ---- base plot -----------------------------------------------------------
  p_base <- cnetplot(trimmed,
                     foldChange         = fc_vec,
                     showCategory       = length(pass_ids),
                     circular           = FALSE,
                     node_label         = "all",
                     layout             = layout_alg,
                     cex_label_category = term_cex,
                     cex_label_gene     = gene_cex)

  ## capture igraph (attr name differs by enrichplot version)
  ig <- attr(p_base, "igraph")
  if (is.null(ig)) ig <- attr(p_base, "graph")

  ## ---- prettify ------------------------------------------------------------
  p <- p_base +
       ggtitle(title) +
       theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))

  ## repel category labels (auto-detect flag)
  node_df <- p$data
  flag <- c("category", "isCategory", "type")[c("category","isCategory","type") %in% names(node_df)][1]
  if (!is.null(flag)) {
    cat_nodes <- node_df[node_df[[flag]], , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(cat_nodes) > 0)
      p <- p +
        geom_text_repel(data = cat_nodes,
                        aes(label = name),
                        size = term_cex * 3,
                        box.padding = 0.4,
                        segment.alpha = 0.3,
                        seed = 1991)
  }

  ## restore igraph so downstream code can pick it up
  attr(p, "igraph") <- ig
  p
}

## ---- 4. Build & save 2-D plots --------------------------------------------
plots <- list(
  GO_ORA   = make_cnet(ego,    "GO BP ORA – decluttered"),
  KEGG_ORA = make_cnet(ekegg,  "KEGG ORA – decluttered"),
  Reactome = make_cnet(ereact, "Reactome ORA – decluttered")
)

## 4a. multi-page PDF (unchanged)
pdf(file.path(outdir, "cnetplots_decluttered.pdf"), 10, 8)
for (nm in names(plots))
  if (!is.null(plots[[nm]])) print(plots[[nm]])
dev.off()
message("✓ multi-page PDF → ", file.path(outdir, "cnetplots_decluttered.pdf"))

## 4b. one dedicated 2-D file per plot (PDF + PNG)
for (nm in names(plots)) {
  pl <- plots[[nm]]
  if (is.null(pl)) next

  base <- file.path(outdir, paste0(nm, "_cnet_2D"))
  ggsave(paste0(base, ".pdf"), pl, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in")
  ggsave(paste0(base, ".png"), pl, width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
}
message("✓ per-plot 2-D PDFs/PNGs saved next to the 3-D output")

## ---- 5. OPTIONAL: 3-D interactive GO network ------------------------------
if (!is.null(plots$GO_ORA)) {

  ## helper to obtain an igraph whatever the attribute name
  get_graph <- function(gplot, enrich_obj) {
    g <- attr(gplot, "igraph");  if (is.null(g)) g <- attr(gplot, "graph")
    if (is.null(g)) {
      message("igraph attr missing – rebuilding minimal graph")
      tmp <- cnetplot(enrich_obj, foldChange = fc_vec, showCategory = 8)
      g   <- attr(tmp, "igraph"); if (is.null(g)) g <- attr(tmp, "graph")
    }
    g
  }

  ig <- get_graph(plots$GO_ORA, ego)

  if (is.null(ig)) {
    warning("Still couldn’t obtain an igraph → skipping 3-D GO network.")
  } else {

    ## layout (flat z = 0)
    set.seed(123)
    xy <- layout_with_fr(ig)
    coords <- cbind(xy, z = 0)
    V(ig)$x <- coords[,1]; V(ig)$y <- coords[,2]; V(ig)$z <- coords[,3]

    ## edge traces
    ed  <- as_data_frame(ig, "edges")
    edge_coords <- data.frame(
      x = c(V(ig)$x[ed$from], V(ig)$x[ed$to], NA),
      y = c(V(ig)$y[ed$from], V(ig)$y[ed$to], NA),
      z = c(V(ig)$z[ed$from], V(ig)$z[ed$to], NA)
    )

    p3d <- plot_ly(type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
                   x = edge_coords$x, y = edge_coords$y, z = edge_coords$z,
                   line = list(width = 1, color = "#AAAAAA"),
                   hoverinfo = "none") %>%
           add_markers(x = V(ig)$x, y = V(ig)$y, z = V(ig)$z,
                        text = V(ig)$name,
                        hoverinfo = "text",
                        marker = list(size  = ifelse(V(ig)$category, 8, 4),
                                      color = ifelse(V(ig)$category,
                                                     "#e24a33", "#348abd"))) %>%
           layout(title = "GO ORA cnet-plot (interactive 3-D)",
                  scene  = list(xaxis = list(title = ""),
                                yaxis = list(title = ""),
                                zaxis = list(title = "")))

    html_file <- file.path(outdir, "cnet_GO_ORA_3D.html")
    saveWidget(p3d, html_file, selfcontained = TRUE)
    message("✓ interactive 3-D GO network saved → ", html_file)
  }
}

message("✓ All done – see ‘", outdir, "’ for results.")


```
